title: Evangelion 30 Q wins Japan Media Arts Excellence Award
display_title: Evangelion 30 Q wins Japan Media Arts Excellence Award
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.0 Q wins Japan Media Arts Excellence Award             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Dec 05, 2013 9:50 am Results for this year's Japan's Media Arts Festival are out . The Grand Prize in animation division went to French film Couleur de peau : miel . All Excellence Awards went for Japanese productions this year. They are: The Eccentric Family Television series Director: Masayuki Yoshihara Golden Time Short film Director: Takuya Inaba Sakasama no Patema Theatrical film Director: Yasuhiro Yoshiura Evangelion Gekijouban: Q Theatrical Film Director: Hideaki Anno This is second time Anno has won Excellence Award at Japan Media Arts Festival (previously in 1997 for Evangelion/End of Evangelion). It is one of the most prestigious animation awards in Japan if not the most prestigious. For more on prize see my entry on it here . This year's Jury was headed by legendary animator and director Koji Morimoto . Morimoto commented on Evangelion Q: to be translated perhaps when I have time and energy but they probably translate this themselves anyway wrote: 贈賞理由 映画はファーストカットが命。シリーズ第3部となる本作も、“何かがやってくる”というワクワクするカットで始まる。それは、“いつもの風景”が実は危険に満ちていることを実感させるものだ。その演出を貫くポイントは、日常風景をいかに“普通”に描くかという点である。この“普通”ほど難しいものはなく、アニメーションの場合はその表現の違いが顕著に表れ、スタッフの力量が問われる。鉄塔の向こうで戦うヱヴァ──団地の向こうの異次元・非日常である“異物”が日常に混ざる違和感を表現するには、徹底的に「日常芝居（風景）」を“普通”に表現する必要がある。この演出ができなければ、本作のように秀でた作品にはならない。スタッフロールを見て納得した。優秀な仲間たちと一緒だからこそ、常に新しい扉を突破できる。その環境のためには、ヒットして資金を集めなければならない。アニメーションに憧れたクリエイターたちの本気を感じた。（森本 晃司）

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Thu Dec 05, 2013 9:59 am Congratulations! Well deserved. Tis a great movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Thu Dec 05, 2013 12:38 pm Maybe I'm looking too much into but I can't believe it's just a coincidence that Q won this award just like EoE did. I felt this movie, despite being extended episode the 24th episode of NGE, or say they say, has more similarity with EoE in many aspects. Perhaps Q resonated audiences because of that? Just my opinion. Nevertheless, I'm glad it won the award because it's sure hell ain't anything the franchise has seen. It was also nice to see a movie that was equally polarizing, one which I'm in the camp that loves it.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Dec 05, 2013 12:54 pm Damn straight it won. It was a great film, and I'm glad to see it getting some recognition.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Thu Dec 05, 2013 1:12 pm Yay!

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Dec 05, 2013 2:14 pm Can't believe it's a French movie who won the Grand Prize!(well Franco-Belgian to be exact) @ Rei IV : there was discussion in the forum about how Q can be narratively considered as Rebuild's equivalent of EoE, at least of Shinji's personal EoE, the others characters already getting theirs in 2.0 and during the time skip. IIRC I talked a lot about it in the 4.0 speculation thread.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Thu Dec 05, 2013 2:44 pm Cue congratulations end of original ep 26.

[]:             Quote Post by WunderBah » Thu Dec 05, 2013 3:51 pm Well deserved! Q was a masterpiece, so i'm really looking forward to how 4.0 will deliver.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Dec 05, 2013 5:11 pm Awesome that this movie won! I wonder what's in store for FINAL.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Thu Dec 05, 2013 7:13 pm With winning this award, I'm pretty sure there must of been audiences, critics and etc..... that were very receptive of the film something which, for some reason or another, doesn't seem to get as much attention as negative reviews.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Thu Dec 05, 2013 8:31 pm Another day, another thread surgery. Tangent about The Dark Knight Rises went here . Surviving remnants: TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Also it's nice to see Q raking in more than just cash.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Dec 05, 2013 8:35 pm Saw this on Twitter yesterday, I thought that was pretty cool. I also agree that maybe the similarities between EoE and Q--along with both's gorgeous animation style--is what helped win the award?

[]:             Quote Post by WunderBah » Thu Dec 05, 2013 9:02 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Saw this on Twitter yesterday, I thought that was pretty cool. I also agree that maybe the similarities between EoE and Q--along with both's gorgeous animation style--is what helped win the award?

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Thu Dec 05, 2013 9:59 pm You are. Q is a way of moving EoE up in the narrative so he can move past it and explore what happens after the peak moment of crushing despair. I expect Final to be a ninety minute version of That Scene, but about tolerance for ambiguity and a need for closure instead of boobies.

[]:             Quote Post by kboyrulez12345 » Thu Dec 05, 2013 10:14 pm Very rough translation from Google about the reason Q won: Reason Award Movie life is first cut . This work is a third -part series also begins with the cut an exciting " something is coming " that . It is something to be realized that " landscape usual " is actually is full of danger . Passing through the point that production is that no matter how that to draw in " normal" day-to-day landscape . There is nothing " normal" about this difficult , differences in the expression noticeable , competence of staff is asked in the case of animation . To express the sense of discomfort that " foreign matter ", which is a different dimension and non- daily across the Eva ─ ─ estate fighting in the other side of the tower is mixed in everyday , to express to " normal" , " day-to-day play ( Landscape) " a thoroughly there is a need . This production is not possible, is not a work of excellence , as in the present work . Was satisfied to see the staff roll . Simply because it is along with excellent colleagues , I can break through the new door at all times . For the environment , it is necessary to raise funds in a hit . I felt the seriousness of creators longed to animation . ( Koji Morimoto )

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Fri Dec 06, 2013 12:12 am Just what you'd expect from the master

[]:             Quote Post by Sgt. Griff » Fri Dec 06, 2013 2:38 am Waaaaaaiiiiit a second. I thought everyone here hated Q. Wass goin on here?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Dec 06, 2013 2:56 am No, this is where the contrarians are. It's the rest of the internet that loves Ha and hates Q.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Dec 06, 2013 4:44 am Chuckman wrote: You are. Q is a way of moving EoE up in the narrative so he can move past it and explore what happens after the peak moment of crushing despair. I expect Final to be a ninety minute version of That Scene, but about tolerance for ambiguity and a need for closure instead of boobies.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Dec 06, 2013 10:15 am Sgt. Griff wrote: Waaaaaaiiiiit a second. I thought everyone here hated Q. Wass goin on here?
